title: Pone Around
description: Mine Little Pony and Unicopia based modpack
body:
**Mine Little Pony and Unicopia based modpack with decorating and QoL mods.**  
  
The main idea behind this mod is to make a cozy, server-oriented pack, based on Unicopia and Mine Little Pony where you'd like to go anytime.  
  
You'll love to watch the particle snow from your house, drinking your hot chocolate at sunset. Longer days and nights will give you the chance to enjoy those moments, and if the night sky is clear, you can name your own celestial bodies and constellations.  

This pack won't be too easy to play alone.  This is about playing with and helping each other. 
  
This is a Fabric pack and it's in testing phase. Mods will come and go, so watch out with the updates!  
**Thank you if you download it!**  

![Fiery Chorus' cutiemark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/82erOPau/images/95c69650926092c3f511e3c4b06e7a39c98cb396.png)  
Fiery Chorus was a very talented unicorn, she was able to learn teleportation when she was just a filly. One day when she was testing a new teleportation spell what could bring her even farther, an interesting fruit popped out of the thin air. It looked like some purple popcorn. She tasted it, but as soon as she swallowed the slightly salty food, she disappeared…
